content.Title: How to Integrate Supabase with Next.js for Serverless Applications
content.Excerpt: Integrating Supabase with Next.js enables the creation of serverless applications by combining a powerful backend with a flexible frontend. Start by setting up a Supabase project and a Next.js app, then install the Supabase client library. Use environment variables to securely store your credentials and initialize the client in your app. This setup allows for easy user authentication and data fetching, streamlining your development process.
content.Author: Jaswinder Singh
